tasks.description: Create a /scholarships page offering a $500 photography scholarship. Link-bait strategy — .edu sites link to scholarship pages. Include application form, deadline, and eligibility criteria.
Build a /photography-statistics page with curated industry data (market size, average rates, gear spending). Data pages earn organic backlinks from journalists and bloggers citing stats.

tasks.task: Create author bio pages with Person schema
tasks.description: Create /about/team with founder bio, headshot, credentials, and Person schema markup. Critical for E-E-A-T — Google needs to see real humans behind the content.

tasks.task: Set up Google Business Profile (service area)
tasks.description: Claim and verify a Google Business Profile as a service-area business. Enables local pack visibility and Google Maps presence for 'photography CRM' searches.

tasks.task: Create YouTube channel + first tutorial video
tasks.description: Set up a branded YouTube channel and publish one tutorial (e.g. 'How to set up your photography workflow'). Video results dominate SERPs for how-to queries.

tasks.task: Pitch founder as guest on 3 photography podcasts
tasks.description: Research photography business podcasts (e.g. The Portrait System, Bokeh Podcast) and send personalized pitches. Podcast appearances build authority signals and backlinks from show notes.

tasks.task: Research and buy 2-3 expired photography domains for 301 redirects
tasks.description: Use ExpiredDomains.net or similar to find expired domains with existing backlinks in the photography niche. 301 redirect them to pass link equity. Check spam scores first.

tasks.task: Seed brand searches: share 'argo studio vs honeybook' search prompts in communities
tasks.description: Naturally mention comparison searches in photography forums and groups to generate branded search volume. Google interprets brand searches as an authority signal.

tasks.task: Create LinkedIn newsletter for cross-posting blog content
tasks.description: Set up a LinkedIn newsletter from the founder's profile. Newsletters get push-notified to all connections/followers. Cross-post blog content with canonical tags pointing back.

tasks.task: Set up Medium publication with canonical tags
tasks.description: Create a Medium publication for Argo Studio. Use Medium's 'import story' feature which automatically sets canonical URLs to the original blog post.

tasks.task: Add FAQ sections + FAQPage schema to all blog posts
tasks.description: Add 3-5 FAQ questions to each blog post with FAQPage structured data. Enables rich result FAQ dropdowns in SERPs, dramatically increasing click-through rate.

tasks.task: Add HowTo schema to instructional blog posts
tasks.description: Add HowTo structured data to step-by-step posts (pricing guide, client management). Enables rich how-to cards in search results with step previews.

tasks.task: Fill Organization schema sameAs with real social URLs
tasks.description: Update the Organization schema markup to include actual social media profile URLs in the sameAs array. Currently empty — Google uses these to verify entity identity.

tasks.task: Add dateModified to Article schema + update old posts
tasks.description: Add dateModified to Article structured data and refresh older posts with current information. Google favors recently updated content for competitive queries.

tasks.task: Create 'What is Argo Studio?' entity page for AI citation
tasks.description: Create a dedicated entity page with clear factual statements about what Argo Studio is, who built it, and what it does. Optimized for AI models to cite when answering questions.
